description_long: This is a large, double-bladed battle axe with a striking, fantasy-inspired design. The axe features two broad, jagged metal blades on either side, each with irregular, aggressive edges and visible wear marks. At the center, a spiked metal sphere acts as both a decorative and potentially functional element, with sharp conical spikes radiating outward. The handle is cylindrical, primarily wooden with metal and colored bands reinforcing both ends, and it appears robust enough for heavy use. The overall color palette includes dark metallic grays, deep reds, and accents of green and yellow, giving it a dramatic and intimidating appearance. This axe would stand out as a display piece or as a prop in urban-themed events or installations.
description: A large, double-bladed battle axe with jagged metal edges, a spiked central sphere, and a reinforced wooden handle with colorful bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing both jagged blades, the spiked sphere, and the full width of the axe head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the blades and the prominent spiked sphere at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the back of the blades and the handle's reinforcement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the spiked sphere and the thinness of the blade edges.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight wooden handle with metal and colored band reinforcements, textured for grip, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed with jagged, irregular edges, wide and symmetrical, featuring a central spiked sphere and visible wear marks.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with additional decorative metal bands and a central spiked sphere.
